# Isaac Neibaur - Live Website (Production)

**⚠️ DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS REPO MANUALLY.**

This repository is automatically managed by a GitHub Action inside the **`dev-hugo-site`** repository. 

### Deployment Workflow
- Any changes made here manually will be **OVERWRITTEN** the next time the development repo is updated.
- To update the site, make your changes in `dev-hugo-site` and push to its `main` branch.

### Custom Domain
The site is configured to serve at [isaacneibaur.com](https://isaacneibaur.com) via Cloudflare.
